arts.ttl: Maresca's Chelsea are ahead of schedule with CL return in sights
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca believes his youthful Chelsea side are "going in the right direction" in his debut campaign in charge at Stamford Bridge - but now the Italian and his players must finish the job by ensuring a Champions League return next season, starting at Brighton on Friday Night Football.

arts.ttl: The Chelsea games Nicolas Jackson could miss after Enzo Maresca injury update
arts.sum: Chelsea have been dealt a major injury blow ahead of their return to Premier League action this weekend with confirmation that top-scorer Nicolas Jackson will spend some time on the side-lines. That has now been confirmed by Maresca in a pre-match press conference ahead of Chelsea's game against Brighton.
